title: Senior Product Owner Genesys Cloud
description:
**Intrum is Europe's leading credit management services provider, listed on Nasdaq Stockholm and operating across 20 markets. Intrum is in a pivotal phase, strengthening performance and accelerating transformation and digitalisation across Europe. We are now looking for a Senior Product Owner - Head of Genesys Cloud to lead the next phase of Intrum's contact center journey. This is a senior group-level role where you will act as a bridge between business, operations and IT, while leading a geographically distributed team and shaping how Intrum uses Genesys Cloud across the organization.** 




  





  





**Job description** 




 With Genesys Cloud now rolled out across almost all markets, the focus is shifting from implementation to value creation: improving operations, driving adoption, strengthening governance and exploring new capabilities. As Senior Product Owner - Head of Genesys Cloud, you will be responsible for Genesys Cloud and related contact center capabilities at group level. You will lead the Center of Excellence team and set the agenda for how Intrum develops, governs and uses Genesys Cloud in the best possible way across markets.
 



  





 It is a business-oriented leadership role where you will need to understand contact center operations, platform capabilities, local market needs and group-level priorities. You will report to the Head of Strategy & Transformation and be based in Stockholm. The team consists of approximately 10 people across IT and operations, located in several countries.
 



  





  





**Your main tasks will be to:** 



* Take group-level ownership of Genesys Cloud and related contact center capabilities
* Lead and further develop the Genesys Cloud Center of Excellence
* Set the roadmap, priorities and governance model for the platform going forward
* Drive adoption, value creation and continuous improvement across local markets
* Support local markets and super users in using Genesys Cloud effectively
* Stay updated on new Genesys capabilities, including AI and Voice AI
* Act as a bridge between business, operations and IT
* Lead, develop and strengthen the team, ensuring clear ownership and delivery



  





  





**Who are you?** 




 We are looking for a senior, business-oriented and collaborative leader with solid experience from Genesys Cloud, contact center operations and complex transformation environments. You may currently work as a Product Owner, Platform Owner, Channel Responsible, Contact Center Technology Lead, Genesys Cloud Lead, Solution Owner or in a similar role.
 



  





 You must have recent and relevant experience from Genesys Cloud and understand what it takes to implement, develop and scale the platform in a larger organisation. You have likely been involved in a Genesys Cloud rollout, implementation or major transformation and are comfortable driving decisions, stakeholders and delivery.
 



  





  





**Requirements** 



* 7+ years of relevant experience, preferably in complex, international or multi-market environments.
* Strong and current knowledge of Genesys Cloud and contact center operations.
* Experience from Genesys Cloud rollout, implementation, migration or transformation.
* Previous experience as Product Owner, Product Manager, Channel Responsible, Platform Owner or similar.
* Experience of roadmap ownership, prioritisation and stakeholder management.
* Ability to bridge business, operations and IT, and translate platform capabilities into business value.
* Solid team management experience, with an empathetic and attentive leadership style.
* Solution-oriented, pragmatic and genuinely interested in Genesys Cloud and customer interaction platforms.



  





  





**Personal characteristics** 



* Strong leader with the ability to set direction and drive an agenda
* Business-oriented, pragmatic and solution-focused
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills
* Structured, delivery-oriented and comfortable taking ownership in complexity
* An empathetic and collaborative leader with the ability to build trust, develop people and create engagement across teams and stakeholders



  





  





**What we offer** 




 At Intrum we offer not only a challenging and rewarding career but also a challenging, exciting and developing position in an international company with growth ambitions. At Intrum you will work with highly motivated and skilled co-workers globally and be part of a supportive culture where effort counts.
 



  





 This is a full-time permanent position based at Intrum’s Global Headquarters on Riddargatan in central Stockholm. The position reports to the Head of Strategy & Transformation.
 



  





 In this recruitment, Intrum collaborates with Alumni Global. For more information, please contact Dilan Thorén Sadek, dilan.sadek@alumniglobal.com.

title: Azure Cloud Specialist till Akademiska Hus
description:
*Vill du axla en strategisk nyckelroll och driva nästa generations hybridinfrastruktur hos en av Sveriges viktigaste samhällsaktörer? Som Azure Cloud Specialist hos Akademiska Hus får du kombinera teknisk innovation i absolut framkant med den långsiktiga trygghet och det starka utvecklingsfokus som ett av landets största fastighetsbolag erbjuder.* 




  





**Ditt uppdrag** 




 Hos oss är IT en helt central möjliggörare för att skapa hållbara, smarta och innovativa campus för högre utbildning och forskning. Vår tekniska miljö är en sann hybridlösning där en avancerad, molnbaserad Azure-plattform lever sida vid sida med komplexa on-prem-miljöer. Detta ställer unika krav på din kompetens – vi söker dig som inte bara besitter djup teknisk expertis inom hybrid arkitektur i Azure, utan som också har förmågan att kliva fram som en trygg teknisk ledare med kraften att driva både komplexa team och modern teknik framåt.
 



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Förutom den unika kompetensen inom teknik och ledarskap tror vi du trivs när din arkitektoniska blick sträcker sig bredare än enbart Azure Cloud; du har förmågan att se helheten i en storskalig infrastruktur och driva förändringsresor på ett strategiskt plan. Som person är du en utpräglad lagspelare som ser samarbete med arkitekter och övriga delar av verksamheten som en självklarhet för att nå gemensamma mål. Med ett coachande, pedagogiskt och engagerande förhållningssätt stöttar du dina kollegor i infrastrukturteamet, samtidigt som du är en skicklig kommunikatör som enkelt översätter komplex teknik till affärsnytta för olika intressenter.
 



  





**Ansvarsområden** 



* Ta ett övergripande ansvar för arkitektur, implementering och stabil drift av vår komplexa hybridmiljö (Azure och on-prem).
* Leda tekniska infrastrukturprojekt och agera mentor/coach för teamets medarbetare.
* Framtidssäkra, säkra och optimera Azure-plattformen med fokus på avancerad nätverksarkitektur, automation och identitetshantering.
* Samarbeta tätt med enterprise-arkitekter och verksamheten för att realisera strategiska IT-mål.
* Säkerställa proaktiv kostnadsstyrning (FinOps) och effektiv resursallokering i molnmiljöerna.



  





**Din bakgrund och erfarenhet** 




 För att axla denna seniora roll behöver du ha en gedigen teknisk grund kombinerat med förmågan att agera kravställare och teknisk ledare.
 


* Akademisk utbildning inom IT/data eller motsvarande mångårig yrkeserfarenhet som bedöms likvärdig.
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet i en senior specialistroll med praktisk vana av att designa och drifta storskaliga hybrid- och on-prem-miljöer.
* Aktuell certifiering inom Microsoft Azure (exempelvis Azure Administrator Associate, Security Engineer Associate eller motsvarande expert-certifiering).
* Djupgående teknisk expertis inom Azures kärnkomponenter (Compute, Network, Storage, Identity, Security och Automation).
* Gedigen erfarenhet av Active Directory, Entra ID, PowerShell samt hantering av Conditional Access-policys.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Azure Virtual Desktop, Application Gateway och Application Proxy.
* Mycket god kommunikationsförmåga i tal och skrift på både svenska och engelska.



  





**Meriterande** 



* Kunskap inom DNS och Linuxmiljöer.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Terraform eller annan Infrastructure as Code (IaC)-lösning.
* Kunskaper inom certifikatshantering, PKI, ADCS.
* Certifiering Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions.



  





**Vi erbjuder** 




 Akademiska Hus är ett av Sveriges största fastighetsbolag. Vi utvecklar och förvaltar lokaler för högskolor och universitet och skapar förutsättningar för världsledande utbildning och forskning. Genom att även erbjuda labb och kontor för privata företag blir våra campus mer innovativa och hållbara platser, som främjar samverkan, kunskapsutveckling och kreativitet.
 



 Vi satsar på våra medarbetare och ser till att de växer. Alla har individuella uppdrag och vi erbjuder ledarutvecklingsprogram för chefer och projektledare. Att lära och tänka nytt är en del av vårt DNA. Genom ett gediget utbud av lärandetillfällen och utbildningar, samverkan och erfarenhetsutbyte utvecklas vi ständigt. Med bra chefer som ger oss förutsättningar, förtroende och mandat att leverera, utvecklas vi både som människor och bolag.
 



 Hållbarhet är ledstjärna i allt vi gör. Och hållbara blir vi tillsammans. Vi vet att våra medarbetare är avgörande för vår framgång och erbjuder därför alla olika typer av initiativ inom friskvård och hälsa.
 



 Vill du veta mer om oss – ta en titt på vår FILM.
 



  





**Nyfiken?** 




 Känns detta som en möjlighet för dig, ta chansen och sök nu! Urval kommer att ske löpande så vi ser fram emot din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Har du frågor om tjänsten eller processen är du välkommen att kontakta Niklas Seger på niklas.seger@akademiskahus.se / I denna rekrytering samarbetar Akademiska Hus med Randstad. Kontakta gärna ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Erik Perborn erik.perborn@randstad.se eller sophia.fredriksson@randstad.se om du har frågor.
 



 Bakgrundskontroll kommer att genomföras på slutkandidater.
 



  





 Välkommen till en arbetsplats där dina idéer och initiativ värdesätts och där du kan vara med och forma framtiden!

title: Senior AI Cloud Architect Public 360°- Tieto Indtech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
**Senior AI Cloud Architect (AI Platform)- Public 360°- Tieto Indtech (m/f/d)**
*Tietoevry Public 360 - building secure, scalable digital services for the public sector across the Nordics.*
**About The Role**
 Public 360 integrates cloud-based AI capabilities into standard enterprise software. We are building solutions for 600+ public organizations in the Nordics, and our AI platform runs customer deployments at scale and is evolving fast with GenAI and agentic AI.
   

  

 As Senior AI Cloud Architect, you own the cloud architecture for our AI platform and shared services. You will define reference architectures, make key technology choices (Microsoft-first, but open), and ensure security, reliability, and automation as we scale.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Design and evolve the target architecture for a public-cloud-first AI platform (Azure preferred).
* Exploration of alternative deployment strategies for high-security customers
* Build secure, compliant foundations: landing zones, identity, networking, encryption, secrets, logging, and policy-as-code.
* Architect for scale and automation: infrastructure as code, CI/CD, GitOps, self-service environments, and operational runbooks.
* Own platform reliability: observability, SLOs, incident patterns, performance, and cost optimization (FinOps).
* Define patterns for AI product integration: APIs, event-driven processing, data pipelines, and multi-tenant considerations.
* Partner with AI engineers/data scientists on MLOps and LLMOps: model delivery pipelines, feature stores, evaluation, and monitoring.
* Drive security and Trustworthy AI practices together with security, privacy, and product teams (GDPR and data residency aware).
* Support solutioning and pre-sales when needed, and mentor architects/engineers across product teams.


**What You Bring**
* Senior – 8-10+ years of relevant experience, including service or solution architecture in complex product environments. More junior profiles will be considered in case of relevant experience – not the time but the type of experience and responsibility is important to us.
* Strong public cloud architecture skills (Azure: AKS/Container Apps, Functions, App Service, API Management, Event Hubs/Service Bus, Storage, SQL/Cosmos DB, Key Vault, Entra ID).
* Experience with multiple deployment scenarios and high security requirements is a plus
* Hands-on experience with automation: Terraform and/or Bicep, CI/CD (Azure DevOps/GitHub), and modern deployment practices.
* Proven security architecture skills: threat modeling, zero trust, network segmentation, secrets management, vulnerability management, and audit readiness.
* Experience building or operating AI/ML platforms: Azure ML/MLflow, model serving, data pipelines, and LLM integration patterns.
* Ability to translate business needs into pragmatic architectures and communicate clearly with both engineers and stakeholders.


**Nice to have**
* Experience with GenAI platforms (e.g., Azure OpenAI) and guardrails: content filters, prompt injection defense, red teaming, and evaluation.
* Knowledge of data engineering components: Databricks/Spark, Delta Lake, data streaming, and search/vector databases.
* Certifications such as Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Azure Security Engineer, or similar.


**Impact you will have**
* Own the reference architecture for our cloud-first AI platform supporting AI capabilities for public organizations in the Nordics.
* Raise the security and compliance baseline with zero-trust patterns, policy-as-code, and audit-ready controls.
* Increase delivery speed and consistency through automation: self-service environments.
* Improve reliability and cost efficiency with SLO-driven operations, observability, and FinOps practices.


**Tech we use**
 Azure-first and automation-driven: containers/Kubernetes, serverless, messaging, IaC (Terraform/Bicep), CI/CD (Azure DevOps/GitHub), observability, and cloud security tooling. We are open to AWS/GCP experience.
   

  

**What Success Looks Like In 6 Months**
* A clear platform roadmap indicating the next steps for our data and ai platform as baseline for our product teams, supporting our vision of AI-first and agentic-first software offerings in the public sector domain.
* Review and implementation of defined improvements of automation framework and pipelines in place for core platform services.
* Operational excellence established: dashboards, SLOs, alerting, and incident playbooks used in day-to-day operations.
* Security and Trustworthy AI governance embedded: threat models, risk assessments, and guardrail patterns for GenAI use cases.


**Why join us**
* Build technology that improves citizen services - with real-world scale and meaningful impact.
* A highly skilled, collaborative environment with room to influence architecture decisions end-to-end.
* Modern cloud-first stack, strong focus on security and responsible AI, and freedom to explore new approaches (including agentic AI).
* Professional growth, international collaboration, and a culture built on trust, transparency, and ownership.


**Practicalities**
 Location and work setup: flexible/hybrid, ideally near one of our development hubs in Scandinavia (Oslo, Stockholm, Copenhagen or Espoo). Fluent English required; Nordic language skills are a plus.
   

  

**Are you our new colleague?**
 We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager Geir Are Bjørnsrud (geirare.bjornsrud@tietoevry.com)
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: Senior Solution Architect
description:
Nu söker vi en
 **Senior Solution Architect** 
 som vill bidra med sin kompetens, utvecklas tillsammans med oss och som vill vara med och driva den digitala infrastruktur som håller det nordiska samhället igång. Kanske är du vår nästa kollega?
 



  





**We empower our Nordic society** 




 Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation. Våra tjänster är kritiska – inte bara för våra kunder, utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort.
 



  





**Din roll på Iver** 




 Som Senior Solution Architect blir du en del av teamet
 **Solution Excellence** 
 och arbetar i en senior, affärsnära presale-roll med stort tekniskt ansvar. Din vardag präglas av nära samarbete med sälj, affär och leverans samt tät dialog med kund, ofta i komplexa och affärskritiska sammanhang. Du leder den tekniska lösningsdesignen i sälj- och upphandlingsprocesser, från tidig behovsanalys till färdigt lösningsförslag. Rollen innebär arbete med både offentlig och privat upphandling, där kvalitet i lösning, kostnadsbild och dokumentation är avgörande. Du har stor möjlighet att påverka hur Ivers managerade tjänster utvecklas och presenteras mot marknad och kund.
 



  





**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter** 



* Presale av managerade tjänster inom hela Ivers erbjudande
* Framtagning av vinnande lösningsförslag i sälj- och upphandlingsprocesser
* Lösningsdesign med ansvar för tekniska risker
* Kostnadsberäkning och optimering av lösningar
* Genomföra workshops och hålla kundpresentationer



  





  





**Vad erbjuder vi dig?** 




 På Iver blir du en del av ett sammanhang där människor och teknik utvecklas tillsammans. Hos oss får du arbeta nära den senaste tekniken, bidra till samhällsviktig digitalisering och vara med på en spännande tillväxtresa.
 



 Vi tror på lärande, innovation och att växa tillsammans. Det finns alltid utrymme att utvecklas inom ditt specialistområde, utforska ny teknologi eller ta nästa steg i ditt ledarskap. Tillsammans utmanar vi etablerade arbetssätt, testar nytt och förbättrar kontinuerligt – eftersom vi vet att innovation skapas av människor som får möjlighet att tänka stort.
 



 Vi ger samma löfte till våra kollegor som till våra kunder: att alltid vara
 *“beside you”, “behind you” och “before you”* 
 . Vi kallar det
 **The Iver Way** 
 .
 



  





**Förmåner hos oss** 




 📄 Kollektivavtal & trygga villkor
 



 🏠 Hybridarbete
 



 💪 Friskvårdsbidrag
 



 👓 Terminalglasögon
 



 ⏳ Tidsbank – 24 h extra ledighet/år
 



 🩺 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring
 



 💼 Tjänstepension (ITP) & flexpension
 



  





**Vem är du?** 




 För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har:
 


* Gedigen erfarenhet av att arbeta som Solution Architect eller i en senior presale-roll, med ansvar för teknisk lösningsdesign i affärssammanhang
* Erfarenhet av managerade tjänster och vana att arbeta med komplexa IT-lösningar i dialog med kund
* Förmåga att leda den tekniska delen av sälj- och upphandlingsprocesser, från behovsanalys till färdigt lösningsförslag
* God förståelse för kostnadsbild, risker och kvalitet i lösningsdesign
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga i svenska och engelska, samt trygghet i att hålla presentationer och workshops



  





**Personliga egenskaper** 




 För att lyckas i rollen är du analytisk och strategisk, med förmåga att omsätta komplexa behov till genomtänkta och hållbara lösningar. Du är trygg i kunddialogen och van vid att presentera och resonera med beslutsfattare på olika nivåer. Du arbetar drivande och initiativtagande, tar ansvar för både process och resultat, och trivs i ett prestigelöst samarbete med andra. Samtidigt är du strukturerad, har lätt för att prioritera och säkerställer hög kvalitet i leveranser även i komplexa och tidspressade sammanhang.
 



  





**Placeringsort:** 
 För denna roll ser vi att du utgår från vårt kontor i
 **Malmö, Göteborg eller Stockholm** 
 .
 



  





**Övrig information:** 




 Vi har kunder inom alla branscher och sektorer inklusive säkerhetsklassad verksamhet, därför genomför vi bakgrundskontroller i samtliga av våra rekryteringsprocesser.
 



  





 Skicka gärna in din ansökan redan idag – vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Iver eftersträvar en jämn könsfördelning och värdesätter etnisk och kulturell mångfald. Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen använder vi tester för att säkerställa en rättvis och träffsäker bedömning.
 



  





**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 2026.07.10
 



**Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
 



  





 Välkommen att kontakta chef Theresia Holm (
 
 theresia.holm@iver.se
 
 ) eller rekryterare Thandi Schüler (
 
 thandi.schuler@iver.se
 
 ) vid frågor eller funderingar kring tjänsten.
 



  





 Vi undanber oss vänligen men bestämt all kontakt från externa rekryterings- och bemanningsföretag samt annonsförsäljare kring rekryteringen.

title: Senior Customer Manager - Tieto Banktech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
 We are looking for a Senior Customer Manager for Card Personalization services who wants to be part of Tieto Banktech. Tieto Banktech powers some of the Nordics’ most trusted banking systems with secure, reliable, and scalable solutions. Using automation, data, AI, and cloud, supported by hands-on guidance, we help banks modernize their core, strengthen trust, and deliver greater impact across the banking experience.
   

  

 Card Personalization unit helps banks and fintechs to issue physical payment cards. We are a market leader in the Nordic - Baltic region and look to expand in Europe. Our services cover the whole value chain of card issuance, starting from the design and material selection, followed by the manufacturing by one of our European or Global partners, then personalizing cards in one of our own personalization sites in the region, and finally packing and delivering final product to cardholders around the world.
   

  

**When joining Tieto Banktech as a Senior Customer Manager, you will:**
* Join a skilled and experienced international team of cards and personalization experts, where you learn new things with your colleagues.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with customers and stakeholders. Act as a trusted advisor to customers, understanding their needs and providing tailored solutions to meet their requirements.
* Identify and pursue new business opportunities in target markets. Develop a robust sales pipeline, negotiate and close deals, and ensure the achievement of targets.
* Work closely with internal teams, including marketing, product development, and customer service, to ensure alignment and support for sales initiatives.
* Represent the company at selected industry events. Contribute to company’s initiatives by sharing insights and expertise on market trends and best practices.


**Who We Are Looking For Someone With**
* Proven experience in customer management, international sales and relationship building in financial sector or related services, preferably in cards and payments area.
* Strong background in solution and service sales with bright technology acumen.
* Strategic thinking and customer engagement skills.
* Hands-on operational experience with a deep understanding of the market.
* Demonstrable and successful track-record of managing sales and customer relationships.
* High level presentation skills with the ability to gain credibility and trust with a variety of technical and non-technical stakeholders and influencers within the customer organizations.
* You are fluent in Swedish and English, both verbally and in writing.


**We offer**
 We offer you professional growth, meaningful projects, open culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We offer you an opportunity to create the future of a growing, fast-developing, and important sector. We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working. Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle where you need to unlearn and relearn every day as new possibilities emerge.
   

  

**Did we get you inspired?**
 We look forward to your application!
   

  

 Interviews will be held continuously, so we encourage you to apply today! For more information or questions, please contact Talent Acquisition team recruitmentinbanking@tieto.com
   

  

*Please note that interview screening process will start mid August.*
 Hope to hear from you soon!
   

  

**Location: Solna / Sweden**
*We perform background checks on all final candidates.*
*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*
 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.

title: Databricks Architect/Engineer - Tieto Tech Consulting (m/f/d)
description:
Jobbeskrivning
   

  

**Tietos verksamhet inom Data/AI söker nu en Data Architect eller en Data Engineer med fokus på Databricks som vill bidra till vår och våra kunders utveckling.**
 Har du praktisk erfarenhet av att migrera traditionella BI-lösningar till moderna plattformar med Databricks? Vill du både designa arkitekturen och själv bygga pipelines, modeller och transformationer? Då kanske du är vår nästa kollega!
   

  

 Vi söker dig som vill leda och driva utvecklingen av moderna dataplattformar – från förstudie och arkitektur till implementering och förvaltning. Du kommer spela en central roll i transformationen från äldre lösningar som Azure Synapse och SSIS till ett framtidssäkrat Lakehouse baserat på
 **Databricks** 
 ,
 **Apache Spark** 
 och
 **dbt.**
**Din roll som data engineer/data architect inom Databricks på Tieto Tech Consulting**
 Som arkitekt hos oss får du en central roll i att designa och implementera moderna. dataplattformar – ofta med Databricks som nav. Du arbetar nära kundens verksamhet, tar ansvar för skalbarhet, säkerhet och prestanda, och bidrar till en datadriven kultur både hos kund och internt. Du jobbar i uppdrag som ofta sträcker sig över 1–2 år, antingen som en del av ett större team eller som specialist.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifterna Kan Bland Annat Inkludera**
* Design och implementering av skalbara plattformar med fokus på Databricks.
* Migrering från traditionella miljöer som Azure Synapse.
* Kodning i Python och hantering av CI/CD i Azure DevOps.
* Strukturera Medallion-arkitektur och säkra kvalitet i olika datalager.
* Rådgivning kring molnarkitektur (Azure, GCP eller AWS).
* Bidra till kompetensutveckling internt genom t.ex. workshops eller mentorroller.


**Vi Söker Dig Som**
* Har lång erfarenhet inom data & analytics och en stark teknisk grund inom moderna plattformar.
* Cirka 10 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet, varav åtta år inom data och analytics – med fokus på arkitektur och lösningsdesign.
* Mycket god erfarenhet av Databricks och Python.
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD och arbete i Azure DevOps.
* Förståelse för skalbar, säker molnarkitektur – gärna i Azure.
* Flytande kunskaper i svenska och engelska både skriftligt och muntligt.


 Vi tror att du är självgående, nyfiken och van att jobba i konsultnära uppdrag där du både bygger och förklarar.
   

  

**Det Är Mycket Meriterande Om Du Har**
* Certifiering inom Databricks.
* Erfarenhet av verktyg som DBT, Airflow eller Spark.
* Vana att arbeta med analytics-verktyg och datamodellering.


**Vi erbjuder**
 Vi erbjuder dig en arbetsplats för professionell utveckling, meningsfulla projekt, en öppen kultur och en möjlighet för kompetensutveckling i ett spännande område där det konstant händer nya saker.
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Är du redo att forma framtidens dataplattformar? Bifoga ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil så kontaktar vi dig. Intervjuer kommer att hållas löpande, så vi uppmuntrar dig att ansöka redan idag
   

  

 Jobbtyp: Heltid
   

  

 Stationeringsort: Stockholm/Solna
   

  

*Vi utför bakgrundskontroller av alla slutkandidater.*
*Tieto avböjer samtal från rekryteringsföretag.*
 Ytterligare information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.

title: Product Manager, Data Insights
description:
**About Us**
**nShift** 
 is the leading global provider of cloud delivery management solutions (SaaS), we enable the frictionless shipment and return of almost one billion shipments across 190 countries each year. We are headquartered in London and Oslo and have over 500 employees across offices in Sweden, Finland, Norway, Denmark, the United Kingdom, Poland, the Netherlands, Belgium, and Romania.
   

  

 Our software is used by many of the world leading e-commerce, retail, manufacturing, and 3PL shippers due to us having over 1000 carriers integrated into our platform, nearly 3 times more than our competitors!
   

  

 If you buy goods online, there is a strong chance that nShift has powered that delivery, so come and join us as we shape the future of shipping, one frictionless journey at a time.
   

  

**About You**
 You think like a product manager and work like a data scientist. You have shipped ML-powered products to real customers and can point to the decisions you made, not just the ones made around you. Messy data, ambiguous model outputs, and stakeholders who don't yet see why the data matters are familiar territory.
   

  

 You think in terms of compounding: how every data point collected today improves predictions tomorrow, and how that improvement builds a position competitors cannot close. Data insights is nShift's path from a tool company to an intelligence platform, and that scope motivates you rather than overwhelming you.
   

  

 You are as comfortable in a Jupyter notebook as in a leadership meeting, and you know when each is needed.
   

  

**Purpose of role**
 The mission is to define what nShift builds with that data, validate it before engineering commits, and ship intelligence products that help shippers make better decisions. A shipper asking "how can I improve my delivery experience" should get an answer powered by the full network, not just their own history. Done well, that becomes a compounding intelligence layer: every data point collected today improves suggestions tomorrow, and the improvement creates a position no competitor can close.
   

  

 The intelligence layer draws from two sources. Structured operational data, such as shipment telemetry and carrier performance, feeds statistical models and predictions. Qualitative data, such as customer support interactions, delivery exception messages, and community feedback, carries signal that numbers alone cannot surface. LLMs make that signal extractable and usable at scale. This role owns both.
   

  

 The role sits at the intersection of product management and data science. You have the technical depth to build ML proof-of-concepts independently and the commercial judgment to translate those capabilities into products customers pay for. You write the strategy and the first notebook.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
**Define and own the data driven product strategy**
* Own the roadmap for nShift's data intelligence layer: carrier performance prediction, cross-customer benchmarking, ML-driven carrier recommendations, and related capabilities.
* Translate nShift's data asset into a sequenced product strategy that delivers near-term value while building toward the compounding intelligence layer vision.
* Define the information architecture for the data insights layer: what data is collected, how it is normalized (in partnership with adjacent teams), and how it is exposed to upstream products.
* Make hard prioritization calls: what to build first to validate the ML hypothesis, what to defer, and what to kill when the data doesn't support the bet.
* Own the qualitative intelligence pipeline alongside the quantitative one: define which unstructured sources carry decision-relevant signal (support tickets, delivery exception messages, customer forum, carrier communications), how LLM-extracted insights are structured for downstream use, and how qualitative and quantitative signals combine into a coherent intelligence product.
* Own the positioning and differentiation narrative: why this dataset is uniquely nShift's, why no competitor can replicate it, and how to articulate that defensibility to enterprise buyers.


**Build and validate before engineering commits**
* Run ML proof-of-concepts independently: data exploration, feature engineering, model selection, and initial validation, using Python, notebooks, and the data available in nShift's data layer.
* Define the evaluation framework for both ML models and LLM pipelines. For ML features: what accuracy thresholds matter, how to measure model performance in production, how to distinguish signal from noise. For LLM-based features: how to assess output consistency, factual grounding, and quality at scale, where traditional accuracy metrics don't apply.
* Design lightweight experiments that answer the key questions before a full engineering team is committed. Does the prediction accuracy justify the product? Does cross-customer data improve the model significantly? Is the data we have sufficient, or do we need to instrument more?
* Translate POC findings into clear build, kill, or iterate decisions backed by data.


**Partner across data, engineering, and commercial teams**
* Work closely with engineers to define the data models, pipelines, and normalization standards needed to power ML features. You are a customer and co-designer of the data layer, not a passenger.
* Drive integration of data insights capabilities into existing products. Work closly with your PM peers to make this happen.
* Engage directly with customers and prospects across the full spectrum, from small shippers to global enterprises, to validate intelligence use cases: what decisions do they make today that better data would improve? What would they pay for? What do they trust?
* Build the commercial narrative: ROI frameworks, value quantification, and positioning for the target buyer.


**Govern the data responsibly**
* Define the anonymization, aggregation, and consent frameworks that make cross-customer benchmarking legally and ethically sound, and credible to enterprise customers who will ask hard questions.
* Work with Legal and the DPO to ensure data usage within the intelligence layer meets GDPR and contractual obligations. The data asset is only valuable if customers trust nShift to use it appropriately.
* Establish transparency standards for ML-powered recommendations: when does a merchant see why a carrier was recommended? What level of explainability builds trust without revealing proprietary network data?


**What You'll Bring**
**Must-have**
* Hands-on data proficiency across both paradigms: you can build and validate ML proof-of-concepts (data exploration, feature engineering, model training, evaluation) using Python and standard ML tooling (scikit-learn, pandas, XGBoost, or equivalent), and you can design and evaluate LLM-based analysis pipelines (prompt design, retrieval-augmented approaches, output quality evaluation). You are not a data scientist or an ML engineer, but you can work like one when the problem requires it.
* Shipped ML-powered products: you have personally driven an ML or data intelligence product from initial hypothesis to production, including defining evaluation criteria, partnering with data engineers and scientists, and making commercial decisions based on model performance data.
* PM fundamentals with commercial depth: 3+ years shipping B2B SaaS products. You can build a business case, define pricing, run customer discovery, and hold direct conversations with enterprise buyers about ROI.
* Data literacy that earns engineering respect: you understand data models, pipeline design, normalization challenges, and the practical constraints of real production data. You can review a data schema and immediately ask the right questions.
* Clear communication across the technical and commercial boundary: you can explain a precision-recall tradeoff to a CPO and a carrier event data use case to a data engineer in the same afternoon, without condescending to either.
* Excellent written and verbal English: you will write strategy documents, ML experiment briefs, customer-facing product narratives, and present to leadership, often in the same week.


**Nice to have**
* Experience with time-series or logistics domain data: carrier performance modelling, routing optimization, ETA prediction, or related domains.
* Familiarity with data platform concepts: data lake houses, feature stores, model registries, observability for ML in production.
* Background in cross-customer benchmarking or network intelligence products, where the value comes from aggregation rather than individual customer data.
* Experience with GDPR-compliant data product design in a multi-tenant B2B SaaS context.
* Nordic or European logistics market experience: carrier landscape, regulatory environment, freight economics.
* Track record of building the first data product at a company, defining standards rather than inheriting them.


**Please ensure you upload your CV in English**
 At nShift we believe in embracing diversity in all forms and fostering an inclusive environment for everyone which we believe is essential for our continued success. We're an equal-opportunity employer which means that all applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, family or parental status, national origin, veteran, neurodiversity, or disability status.

title: Verksamhetskonsult (Business consultant) - Tieto (m/f/d)
description:
Jobbeskrivning
   

  

**PPS-konsult på Tieto - Bidra till framgångsrika förändringar! (m/f/d)**
 Tietos PPS-verksamhet växer och vi söker nu fler kollegor som vill vara med och bidra till vår egen och våra kunders utveckling. Vår mission är att hjälpa organisationer att nå sina uppsatta mål och genomföra hållbara förändringar inom projekt- och verksamhetsutveckling. Det gör vi genom vår modell PPS via PPS OnLine, workshoppar, mentorskap och utbildningar – alltid med ett mänskligt och agilt perspektiv.
   

  

 Läs gärna mer om våra erbjudanden här PPS kunderbjudande
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 I rollen kommer du att jobba både externt i konsultuppdrag med kunder i olika branscher och internt med t.ex. erbjudande- och modellutveckling. Du kommer att få leda utbildningar och workshoppar, leda webbinarier och vara rådgivare till kunder. Du kommer att ingå i ett team som agerar aktivt för att vara en lärande organisation i vilken vi hjälper och lär av varandra.
   

  

**Egenskaper och förmågor**
 Du är en nyfiken person som alltid strävar efter personlig utveckling. Du är trygg, ödmjuk och prestigelös samt affärsmässig med god social förmåga och förmåga att bygga starka relationer. Du tycker om att dela med dig av din kunskap och lära ut till andra. Du har även förmågan att hantera flera parallella uppdrag samtidigt. Du behärskar både svenska och engelska flytande i tal och skrift och har förmågan att formulera dig på ett övertygande och tydligt sätt.
   

  

**Erfarenheter**
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av att arbeta som konsult, leda projekt med agilt arbetssätt och har arbetat i organisationer där agila transformationer har genomförts. Du har gärna även erfarenhet av att etablera eller driva portföljstyrning samt arbetat med effektstyrning, nyttorealisering och förändringsledning. Har du erfarenhet av att lära ut eller skapa digitala lärandemöjligheter är det meriterande.
   

  

 Om du vill vara med och bidra till framgångsrika förändringar och arbeta i en dynamisk och inspirerande miljö, sök dig då till Tieto och PPS-teamet.
   

  

 Låter det intressant?
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! Bifoga ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil så kontaktar vi dig. Intervjuer kommer att hållas löpande, så vi uppmuntrar dig att ansöka redan idag! Om du har ytterligare frågor om rollen är du varmt välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Marie Hansen, marie.hansen@tieto.com
   

  

*Vi utför bakgrundskontroller av alla slutkandidater.*
*Tieto avböjer samtal från rekryteringsföretag.*
**Om Tieto**
 Tieto skapar meningsfull teknologi som bidrar till att göra världen bättre. Vi är ett ledande techbolag med lång historia och närvaro i Norden men har också global kapacitet. Baserat på våra kärnvärden öppenhet, trovärdighet och mångfald, jobbar vi tillsammans med våra kunder – och utvecklar en digital framtid där företag, samhällen och människor kan växa.
   

  

 Våra 24 000 experter globalt specialiserar sig på cloud, data och mjukvara för tusentals företag och organisationer inom privat och offentlig sektor i mer än 90 länder. Tieto omsätter årligen cirka 3 miljarder euro och företagets aktier är noterade på NASDAQ-börsen i Helsingfors och Stockholm samt på Oslo Børs.
   

  

 Ytterligare information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: Infrastructure Security - Service Owner
description:
**The Role** 




 As the Service Owner Infrastructure Security Nordics you can be situated in
 **Stockholm, Helsinki,Oslo or Copenhagen** 
 and apply to which you location you prefer.
 



 For this position: We work three days in the office; Tuesday-Thursday, and remote Friday to Monday.
 



  





 You hold end-to-end accountability for our security service portfolio across strategic, tactical, and operational levels. Your mission is to ensure that security services continuously evolve to meet business demands while delivering measurable value.
 



 You are technically broad, with a deep experience across diverse infrastructure stacks. In this role, you will transition your hands-on expertise into a leadership capacity—acting as a subject matter expert and problem manager while steering our external partners toward excellence. In short you will be our Nordic go-to person regarding security related service operations.
 



  





**Optimal Background** 




 We believe that you have a strong foundation in the technical areas & problem management now stepping deeper in to compliance & governance but still maintaining the hands-on mentality.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Service Design & Delivery** 



* Govern standardized, scalable infrastructure security services across the enterprise.
* Act as a consultant to developers and application owners, ensuring "security by design" in new solutions.



  





**Compliance & Risk Management** 



* Define, maintain, and enforce infrastructure and security policies.
* Ensure strict adherence to organizational standards and IT security baselines.
* Proactively identify and mitigate infrastructure-related risks.



  





**Vendor & Stakeholder Management** 



* Drive vendor performance to meet cost targets, SLAs, and KPIs.
* Bridge the gap between technical requirements and business objectives through effective communication.
* Lead the resolution of more severe infrastructure security incidents (Problem Management).



  





**Required Competences** 




**Experience:** 
 Minimum 5 years of relevant IT experience. Experience in the retail or restaurant industries is a significant advantage.
 


* **Leadership Mindset:** 
 A broad technical background with the desire to move from hands-on operations to tactical leadership and vendor governance.
* **Vendor Relations:** 
 Proven track record in vendor management, procurement, and contract oversight within an outsourced IT model.
* **Security Literacy:** 
 Deep understanding of cybersecurity principles and the technical frameworks required to implement them.
* **Communication:** 
 Fluent in English (spoken and written), with the ability to influence both technical teams and business stakeholders.



  





**Technical Expertise** 




 Required Core Knowledge
 


* **Network & Core Services:** 
 Configuration and management of DHCP, DNS, NTP, and SMTP.
* **Architecture:** 
 Solid understanding of both Cloud (Azure) and On-Premises infrastructure
* **Security Services:** 
 \* Firewall administration and perimeter defense.
* Vulnerability management lifecycles.
* Azure and M365 Security ecosystems.
* **Other:** 
 Ownership of Azure Virtual Desktop & Security forum



  





 Meritorius Knowledge
 


* **Identity & Access Management:** 
 Active Directory (Domain Controllers, OU structure, delegation) and Entra ID.
* **Endpoint Security:** 
 Management of EDR/XDR and device compliance.
* **Policy & Governance:** 
 Hands-on experience with risk management practices and security policy enforcement.
* **Tools & Automation:** 
 Proficiency in PowerShell for automation and Wireshark for deep-dive troubleshooting.



  





**What McDonald's / Foodfolks is offering you** 




 At Food Folk and McDonald's, all employees are equal, regardless of age, gender, and ethnicity. We want to make a difference and in many cases we are the first step in the career and an integration engine in society, something we are very proud of. At Food Folk / McDonald's, we believe that good food can also be sustainable – for our customers, producers and the environment.
 



 In addition to a global, professional workplace with many great colleagues, you get pension a yearly bonus, food allowance and a range of benefits. With many fun activities all year round, you and all employees will be involved and continue to grow with the Nordic region's largest restaurant chain!
 



  





**Application & Information** 




 Curious? Even if you’re not actively looking, we welcome confidential conversations—get in touch and we’ll tell you more! In this recruitment process, McDonalds / Foodfolks is partnering with Aliby – The Pink Company.
 



 As interviews and selection are conducted on an ongoing basis, we kindly ask you to submit your application as soon as possible via the link. If you have any questions, you are welcome to contact our recruitment consultants:
 



**Omar Burazerovic** 
 0728 897 441, omar.burazerovic@aliby.se
 



**Lars Ohlson** 
 0705 888 175, lars.ohlson@aliby.se
 



 We look forward to receiving your application via the link in the advertisement.
 



  





**About McDonald´s & Food Folk** 




 McDonald’s is the largest restaurant chain in the Nordics, serving iconic products like the Big Mac® and their world-famous fries to 600.000 guests every day. McDonald’s has approximately 20.000 employees in more than 430 restaurants, all delivering a great restaurant experience to their guests. Most of the McDonald’s restaurants are owned and operated by local franchisees.
 



 Since 2017 Food Folk Group has owned the licensee rights for McDonald’s in the Nordics and are responsible for developing McDonald’s in these markets. The Nordic headquarter organization consists of 220 colleagues, and the organization is built on a matrix structure, where most of the employees are working in Group functions.
 



 McDonald’s has a high-performance culture, and we do everything in our power to deliver a great restaurant experience to our guests, no matter if you are working in a restaurant or at the headquarters.
 



 In 2021, McDonald’s became the leading Quick Service Restaurant in each of the Nordic countries for the first time. System-wide sales exceed €1.5 billion, with more than 136 million customers served annually. Food Folk is the largest youth employer in the region, with around 20,000 restaurant employees and approximately 70 franchisees operating across four countries. There are ambitious plans to grow to 600 restaurants by 2030.
 



 We believe in using our scale and reach responsibly, engaging customers, employees, franchisees, suppliers, and partners to make a positive impact in the communities we serve. We are proud of the progress made and remain committed to driving meaningful change across our markets.
 



 Food Folk is an independent company holding a 20-year McDonald’s International Development Licence (“IDL”) to operate McDonald’s restaurants in the Nordics. Owned by the Hands Family since 2017, Food Folk oversees both restaurant operations and the associated real estate portfolio. The corporate organisation comprises around 250 colleagues, with offices in Copenhagen, Helsinki, Oslo, and Stockholm.

title: Senior Sales Executive – Enterprise New Logo
description:
*Are you motivated by opening new enterprise opportunities and building strategic customer relationships in complex B2B environments? Do you thrive in a role where you combine business development, consultative sales, and long-term customer value creation?*
 We are now looking for a Senior Sales Executive to join our enterprise sales team in Stockholm, Copenhagen, and Oslo. In this role, you will focus on winning new enterprise customers helping them modernize and simplify their network environments through solutions within SD-WAN, Managed LAN, Security Services, and Cloud Connectivity.
   

  

**To Succeed In This Role, You Likely Have**
* 10–15+ years of experience within enterprise B2B sales
* Proven track record of opening and winning new enterprise customers, targeting senior stakeholders and drive sales processes from initiation to closure
* Experience selling network transformation solutions such as SD-WAN, Managed LAN, Security Services, and Cloud Connectivity
* Experience managing complex enterprise sales cycles involving multiple stakeholders
* Ability to build relationships across both business and technical stakeholder groups


**About The Role And The Team**
 You will be part of a senior enterprise sales team focused on new customer acquisition within the enterprise segment. The role reports to the local Sales Director and is based in both Stockholm, Copenhagen, and Oslo with a hybrid work setup. GlobalConnect is operating across northern Europe meaning you will join a large community of sales professionals who all share a common drive delivering the best solutions for our clients. As a company, we thrive towards sharing knowledge, learnings, and best practices across the group for the benefit of improved internal collaboration and client projects.
   

  

 In this role, you will work closely with solution specialists, pre-sales engineers, delivery teams, bid managers, and partner stakeholders to shape and win strategic enterprise opportunities. You will play an important role in positioning GlobalConnect as a long-term strategic partner for enterprise customers across the Nordic market.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Working On**
* Identifying, engaging, and winning new strategic enterprise customers
* Building and executing account plans for targeted enterprise accounts
* Driving pipeline growth connected to SmartConnect solutions including SD-WAN, Managed LAN, Security Services, and Cloud Connectivity
* Building strong relationships across enterprise buying groups including business and technical stakeholders such as CIO, CTO, CFO, Head of Infrastructure, Network Architects, Security leaders, IT Operations, Procurement, and legal
* Leading and coordinating internal teams throughout complex sales processes
* Managing large enterprise opportunities from initial engagement through deal closure


**Who We Are Looking For**
 We believe you are someone who enjoys proactive business development and thrives in complex enterprise sales environments. You are structured in your approach, comfortable navigating long sales cycles, and motivated by creating new business opportunities.
   

  

 You are likely to combine commercial drive with a consultative mindset and know how to build credibility with both technical and business stakeholders. Experience from enterprise technology vendors, networking providers, system integrators, or managed service providers is highly relevant for this role.
   

  

 Does this sound like you? If so, we would love to hear from you.
   

  

**Our recruitment process**
* Talent Acquisition Screen
* Hiring Manager interview
* Personality and ability tests feedback and discussion with Talent Acquisition
* Case interview with Hiring Manager and peer/stakeholder
* Final alignment meeting
* References


 This is an opportunity to join a senior team working with strategic enterprise customers and business-critical digital infrastructure across the Nordic market.
   

  

 No need for a personal letter – just send us your CV or LinkedIn profile.
   

  

 Join us and be part of the transformation in the most exciting company within critical digital infrastructure in Northern Europe! Apply today!
   

  

**About Us**
 GlobalConnect is one of the leading connectivity providers in Northern Europe. We’re 2000 passionate and talented individuals who want to make a difference, turning our customers’ visions into reality through connectivity. Our goal is to create the best possible conditions for engaged employees, a place where you can develop and grow, and create unforgettable memories and enjoyable experiences.
   

  

 We have helped develop and digitize societies across the Nordics for more than two decades. Our purpose is what drives us to continue - turning visions into reality by empowering society with connectivity.

title: Nordics Sales Development Representative (Swedish/ Norwegian/ Danish speaking)
description:
London, Copenhagen, Aarhus, Stockholm or Oslo
   

  

**Puzzel: The Low-Down 🔍**
 Puzzel is a leading provider of cloud-based contact centre solutions, empowering businesses to deliver exceptional customer service. Our platform combines omnichannel contact centre, workforce management, and AI-driven analytics to optimize customer interactions and operational efficiency.
   

  

 With 25 years’ experience since our foundation in Norway, we’re already #1 in the Nordics; growing rapidly in the UK and we are already seeing some great success in the Netherlands since opening the entity in mid-2024, but our ambition is to become the clear European market-leader in the coming years 🚀
   

  

**Why we’re proud**
* Recognised as an Innovation and Growth Leader in the 2025 EMEA Customer Experience Platforms Frost Radar
* 2024 CX Awards Winner, ‘Best Mid-Market Contact Center Platform’
* Puzzel was recognised as the 'most innovative European-founded CCaaS provider' and top 3 globally by Frost & Sullivan in 2023
* Best Practices Company of the Year 2023
* Consistently high Glassdoor rating
* Puzzel places high importance on work-life balance and flexible working hours - as recognised by Flexa, placing 16th overall for work:life balance in 2025!
* We are working with Mercer on salary benchmarking, to ensure pay equality and market competitiveness


 Read more about us
 *here* 
 .
   

  

**What You'll Do 🏡💻**
 We are looking for a Sales Development Representative (SDR) who will support our existing team of 3 Account Executives, by partnering with them to map the market, understand target companies and buyer personas, and hopefully convert cold outreach into genuine interest from companies who are viable Puzzel customers.
   

  

**You Will**
* Engage with potential business customers through a variety of channels like LinkedIn, Phone, Email + other automated outreach tools to gain their initial interest and book demos for the Sales Executives, who will then go into more detail and hopefully close the deal!
* Learn how to sell AI driven technology
* MEDDPICC (Metrics, Identified Pain and Identifying Potential Champion) qualification combined with Challenger Sales methodology, to ensure that the prospects you are engaging with have the potential to convert into a closed deal.
* Understand our ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) and Go-To-Market strategy, to ensure you are targeting the right prospects.
* Partner closely with Sales Executives to create joint account plans, product demonstrations and close revenue for the company.
* Collaborate with Marketing to nurture leads through events, industry reports and outbound content.
* You should be a driven and confident individual, willing to learn from your setbacks. Previous B2B experience including outbound cold-calling is a must for this hire, even if not purely in a BDR/SDR role.
* You must be resilient and target and/or money motivated, but the rewards are plentiful, as is the opportunity for career development.


**The must haves 💪**
* You must have native-level fluency in Danish, Swedish or Norwegian + proficiency in English
* Driven, money-motivated and intelligent
* Commercial experience in a b2b setting, with experience and proven success in cold-calling and prospecting.


**The nice to haves ➕➕➕**
* CCaaS, CX or relatable SaaS industry experience
* SDR/BDR/Outbound B2B Sales experience
* Co-piloting SDR AI agents or AI platforms
* Gong or other cadence management systems
* Clay Hunter or similar scraping tools
* Salesforce
* LinkedIn Sales Navigator


**The location**
 This role can be based in London, Copenhagen, Aarhus, Stockholm or Oslo, with expectation of 2-3 days/ week in the office.
   

  

**What’s In it for You? 💰**
* Competitive salary based on Mercer salary benchmarking data + uncapped commission. On target earnings = £55k / 650k DKK / 700k SEK/ NOK
* Flexible, hybrid approach to working; split your time between the office and home
* You get to be part of a fun, driven and supportive team
* Annual Summer and Christmas parties
* Excellent development opportunities and a great company culture


**What To Expect From The Interview Process ❔**
* Screening call with Talent Acquisition
* 1st interview with SDR Director
* 2nd interview with wider commercial/marketing function
* Final panel interview with SDR Director + 2 others


**Puzzel Values 🎯**
* Built on Trust – trust is an intrinsic Nordic value, upon which Puzzel has been built. We trust each other and our customers and partners trust us.
* Stronger Together – working together in a genuinely collaborative way, with a shared purpose, we have an empowered organisation that is better equipped to delight customers and partners.
* Stay Hungry – have a continuous hunger to raise our game, innovate and be the best we can be professionally.


**Diversity & Inclusion 🌍**
 We want everyone at Puzzel to be their true, authentic selves at work irrespective of nationality, race, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical ability, age, or economic background.
   

  

 Whilst we are proud to already have a diverse workforce from across the globe, we are aware that things could always be improved – for example, we currently have a ratio of female 26:74 male employees, which whilst not uncommon for the tech industry (average in SaaS is 26% female), it’s far from ideal. So, what are we doing to improve this?
   

  

* Our Global Leadership Team (C-suite) has shifted from 100% male to 50 male: 50 female in the past 18 months.
* We have increased our % of female hires from 23.6% in 2021 to 38.5% in 2023.
* We are partnering with the likes of Flexa, who have significantly higher-than-average talent pools of candidates from diverse backgrounds.
* We are working with State Employment initiatives in Norway and Sweden to bring candidates through internship/apprenticeship routes and are investigating similar initiatives in the UK and Bulgaria.
* By raising awareness and transparency, we are hoping to further attract a diverse workforce.


 We are continuously striving to foster an inclusive and diverse environment, where everyone is celebrated for who they are. If there is anything we can do to support you in the interview process, or beyond, please let us know.
   

  

**One Last Thing ☝🏻**
 Even if you feel you are only a 75% match for this role, we still want to hear from you. This list is purely indicative. Skills can always be learnt.
   

  

 Please note that we are not able to provide sponsorship for this role, so you must have eligibility to work in the country you are applying for.
   

  

*By applying you accept the terms of our Privacy Notice which can be found on our website. Puzzel are not considering candidates that do not have a work permit in the country we are hiring in.*

title: Senior GSI Account Executive
description:
**About The Job**
 Rubrik has partnered with the World’s leading Global Systems Integrators to develop successful and profitable outcomes for our joint customers, and for our respective companies. The Sr GSI Client Executive candidate will be responsible for managing and driving unprecedented growth with select Global Systems Integrators. This person would come to the role with successful track-record of managing Global partnerships, including; service creation, enablement, cost models, financial selling, and business negotiations. This candidate will lead from the front, communicate openly, and set the example of a positive and collaborative work environment.
   

  

**Required Capabilities & Experience**
 Successful experience partnering Global GSIs – including but not limited to HCL, LTI, TechMahindra, Infosys.
   

  

* Proven track record of managing Global Systems integrators; with specific experience in service creation, enablement, cost models, financial selling, contractual and business negotiations.
* Ability to navigate and accelerate the partner’s adoption of product solutions and subsequent bookings.
* Proven ability to navigate and advocate for the partner and program across multiple internal departments; including, Product Management, Product Marketing, Operations, Technology Alliances, Support, Professional Services, Training, Sales Ops and Legal.
* Develop and execute an account strategy, partner metrics (KPI’s), and business plan.
* Exemplary relationship building skills, with proven ability to drive lasting relationships of mutual value with partners and sales team.
* Ability to build a positive ecosystem with OEMS and ISVs (Inc. Microsoft, AWS)
* Location: United Kingdom (Remote)
* Travel 50%+


**Desired Capabilities & Experience**
* Knowledge of public cloud, storage and backup technologies
* Bachelor’s degree; MBA preferred
* Experience using salesforce.com
* Knowledge of industry sales processes


 Join Us in Securing and Accelerating the World's AI Transformation
   

  

 Rubrik (RBRK), the Security and AI Operations Company, leads at the intersection of data protection, cyber resilience, and enterprise AI acceleration. Rubrik Security Cloud delivers complete cyber resilience by securing, monitoring, and recovering data, identities, and workloads across clouds. Rubrik Agent Cloud accelerates trusted AI agent deployments at scale by monitoring and auditing agentic actions, enforcing real-time guardrails, fine-tuning for accuracy and undoing agentic mistakes.
   

  

 Linkedin | X (formerly Twitter) | Instagram | Rubrik.com
   

  

 Inclusion @ Rubrik
   

  

 At Rubrik, we are dedicated to fostering a culture where people from all backgrounds are valued, feel they belong, and believe they can succeed. Our commitment to inclusion is at the heart of our mission to secure the world’s data.
   

  

 Our goal is to hire and promote the best talent, regardless of background. We continually review our hiring practices to ensure fairness and strive to create an environment where every employee has equal access to opportunities for growth and excellence. We believe in empowering everyone to bring their authentic selves to work and achieve their fullest potential.
   

  

 Our inclusion strategy focuses on three core areas of our business and culture:
   

  

* Our Company: We are committed to building a merit-based organization that offers equal access to growth and success for all employees globally. Your potential is limitless here.
* Our Culture: We strive to create an inclusive atmosphere where individuals from all backgrounds feel a strong sense of belonging, can thrive, and do their best work. Your contributions help us innovate and break boundaries.
* Our Communities: We are dedicated to expanding our engagement with the communities we operate in, creating opportunities for underrepresented talent and driving greater innovation for our clients. Your impact extends beyond Rubrik, contributing to safer and stronger communities.


 Equal Opportunity Employer/Veterans/Disabled
   

  

 Rubrik is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, or protected veteran status and will not be discriminated against on the basis of disability.
   

  

 Rubrik provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability or genetics. In addition to federal law requirements, Rubrik complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.
   

  

 Federal law requires employers to provide reasonable accommodation to qualified individuals with disabilities. Please contact us at hr@rubrik.com if you require a reasonable accommodation to apply for a job or to perform your job. Examples of reasonable accommodation include making a change to the application process or work procedures, providing documents in an alternate format, using a sign language interpreter, or using specialized equipment.
   

  

 EEO IS THE LAW
   

  

 NOTIFICATION OF EMPLOYEE RIGHTS UNDER FEDERAL LABOR LAWS

title: Business Development Representative
description:
Vill du bygga en karriär inom sälj och vill du använda din finska som en professionell fördel? Vi söker nu en driven och kommunikativ BDR/lead converter som vill stötta Hypergenes finska säljteam i att öppna nya dörrar.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som BDR hos Hypergene arbetar du nära säljteamet i Stockholm och blir en nyckelperson i att bygga pipeline för bolagets finska affär. Du tar första kontakten med potentiella kunder och ser till att de finska säljarna alltid har kvalificerade möten i kalendern.
 



 Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden inkluderar:
 


* Cold calling och outreach mot finska prospekts
* Kvalificering av inkommande och utgående leads
* Boka kvalificerade möten åt de finska säljarna
* Uppdatera och hålla CRM-systemet aktuellt
* Samarbeta tätt med övriga BDR-teamet på plats i Stockholm
* Följa upp och säkerställa en hälsosam pipeline för den finska marknaden



  





**Om dig** 




 Vi söker dig som talar finska flytande, gärna som modersmål, samt svenska eller engelska obehindrat i tal och skrift. Du behöver inte ha lång erfarenhet av sälj, men du är nyfiken på att lära dig och trivs med att ta kontakt med nya människor.
 



 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du är:
 


* Kommunikativ och inte rädd för att lyfta telefonen
* Strukturerad och håller en hög aktivitetsnivå, även med begränsad arbetstid
* Resultatorienterad och tävlingsinriktad
* Social och trivs i en teammiljö
* Nyfiken på sälj och SaaS/tech som bransch



  





 Du har möjlighet att arbeta på plats i Stockholm, där resten av BDR-teamet sitter.
 



  





 Det är meriterande om du har:
 


* Tidigare erfarenhet av cold calling, telefonförsäljning eller kundtjänst
* Erfarenhet av CRM-system som HubSpot eller Salesforce
* Erfarenhet av SaaS-, B2B- eller prenumerationsaffärer



  





**Om uppdraget** 




 På Hypergene har vi byggt upp ett skarpt och energifullt BDR-team i Stockholm. Du blir inte en perifer resurs som ringer på distans, utan en aktiv del av teamet som dagligen bidrar till att öppna dörrar för bolagets finska säljare.
 



 Du får coaching och stöd från ett erfaret team, möjlighet att utvecklas inom sälj, och en plats där din finska gör verklig skillnad för affären.
 



 Detta är ett konsultuppdrag på 10–12 timmar i veckan. Perfekt för dig som vill kombinera studier eller annat arbete med praktisk erfarenhet inom sälj i en verklig affärsmiljö.
 



 Startdatum är flexibelt.
 



  





**Om Hypergene** 




 Hypergene är ett svenskt SaaS-företag med över 20 års erfarenhet och mer än 600 kunder runt om i Norden. Bolaget har ungefär 250 medarbetare med kontor i Sverige, Finland och Norge. Hypergenes molnbaserade lösningar stöttar organisationer inom både privat och offentlig sektor i planering, uppföljning och analys. Sedan 2023 är Hypergene en del av Thoma Bravo, en av världens ledande investerare inom mjukvara.
 



 Läs mer om Hypergene här:
 **Hypergene** 




  





**Övrigt** 




 Start: Enligt överenskommelse
 



 Arbetstider: 10–12 timmar/vecka, flexibelt
 



 Plats: Stockholm (på plats)
